overrides.expect: \begin{array}{c} \text {foreach tuple r\in R do} \\ \text {foreach tuple s\in S do} \\ \text {if r_{i} = = s_{j} then add \langle r,s\rangle to result} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {foreach tuple r\in R do} \\ \text {foreach tuple s\in S where r_{i} = = s_{j}} \\ \text {add \langle r,s\rangle to result} \end{array}
